set.analysis_note: The abominations of the surrounding peoples are portrayed as a pervasive moral contamination that has saturated the land entirely, framing wickedness as a spreading inner-communal corruption that defiles a shared space.
set.keywords: ["moral contamination", "defilement pervasive", "corruption spreading", "impurity communal", "conscience warning", "pollution filling"]
